name: Designing Safety-Constrained LLM Systems for Public Health Information Access

description: arXiv:2607.13038v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present the design and implementation of a safety constrained large language model (LLM) system for public health information access, focusing on maternal and child health (MCH) resource navigation. While LLM based systems offer flexible and natural interfaces for information retrieval, their deployment in healthcare contexts introduces risks...
author: Ben Torkian, Jun Zhou
